name: openclaw-grok-proxy-web
description: Third-party Grok/OpenAI-compatible web search provider for OpenClaw with clear phase boundaries for fetch/map/diagnostics takeover.

baseUrl.description: OpenAI/xAI-compatible API base URL, for example https://api.example.com/v1

apiKey.description: API key or secret reference for the Grok-compatible endpoint

model.description: Model id to use for web-grounded chat completions

retry.description: Retry count after the first attempt
